case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. POMME RATANAKANAKA et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF ERICA L. BRACHFELD RE: CALCULATION OF INTEREST & WAIVER OF ATTORNEY FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (D) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $236.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT RATANAKANAKA, POMME

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RATANAKANAKA, POMME $5,417.57 PRINCIPAL, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $593.71 INTEREST, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,047.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RATANAKANAKA, POMME DOES 1 TO 100, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-17-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED NOV-18-2008, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RATANAKANAKA, POMME
